purpose: Machine-readable governance policy for source-backed PipeComponentData artifacts.

sourceScopes.name: raw-source-database-tree
sourceScopes.rule: Do not publish the raw source database tree through GitHub Pages or normal Studio workflows.

sourceScopes.name: public-export-pack
sourceScopes.rule: Only artifacts listed in the public export pack are intended for downstream/static Studio consumption.

sourceScopes.name: normalized-source-backed-data
sourceScopes.rule: Rows must retain provenance and unavailable source values must remain null or UNAVAILABLE.

approvalRequiredFor: exposing raw source tree paths in normal Studio workflows
adding new third-party or vendor source tables
replacing null or UNAVAILABLE source values with guessed engineering values
introducing nearest-size, nearest-rating, nearest-schedule, or fuzzy engineering fallback
